label: WEATHER ALERT
text: IMD issues Orange Alert for Kannur & Kasaragod; Yellow Alert for remaining Kerala districts with heavy monsoon rain expected.

label: CO-KERALA AIRLINE
text: Plans underway for 'Co-Kerala', a new cooperative sector airline aiming to offer domestic flights starting at ₹3,500.

label: TOURISM UPDATE
text: Kerala Government grants official 'industry status' to the tourism sector, allocating ₹325 crore for infrastructure.

label: STARTUP NEWS
text: Kerala Budget allocates ₹79 crore for startups, featuring a dedicated ₹50 crore fund for Gen-Z entrepreneurs.
